title: Jet Freight Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Jet Freight Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Jet Freight Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jet Freight Logistics:
Jet Freight Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jet Freight Logistics!
